rationale: Faithful AS-IS implementation of frozen v13 Task 4a (AM-40 PACKAGE_ROOTS ruling + D17/AM-17 git+code-only impl inventories). inventory.mjs commits exact sorted PACKAGE_ROOTS (five spine packages) + explicit PACKAGE_ROOTS_EXCLUDE (three siblings) with mechanical tracked-package.json completeness unit; DOC_ROOTS + DOC_WEAVER_EXCLUDE/GLOBAL_EXCLUDE; CONTRACT_FILES; empty LEDGER_SOURCES as reviewed final set; RUN_SOURCES; five weaver ids/integer versions; REQUIRED_INVENTORY_IDS deep-equal to the frozen normative table with unit; LOADER_CAPABLE_BUILTIN_SAFE_EXPORTS exact D32 key/value set, deep-frozen, with deep-equal/key/value/freeze/mutation units; WEAVER_IMPL_FILES only for clotho-git-weaver and clotho-code-weaver naming only existing files equal to derived D33 closures. util.mjs exports the ONE shared D33 classifier+relative resolver (AM-34 test 19 proven), dependency-free comment/string/regex-aware lexer, Phase-1 export scanner, real-file walker (root-escape/symlink reject), D26/D29 counted-iterator (count only on completed consumption; accounting only via driver-held accessor), D21 physical-containment (lstat every component, never follow to decide), and no-shell git wrapper allowing only the exact subcommand/arg shapes. test-closure.mjs derives closures with the shared classifier/resolver, proves committed inventories EQUAL derived closures (never trusted), and covers every accepted form via form-only fixtures plus all fatal/no-edge modes. git.mjs uses exactly `git log -S<symbol> --format=%H --reverse -- <path>` and `git log --format=%H --reverse -- <path>`, first result, git:<sha>, malformed fatal, no-result warns. code.mjs emits depends-on across all four endpoint shapes with symbol- vs file-level threading, unrepresentable-consumer only for unresolvable, unused imports no edge, dedup. Zero runtime deps; ESM; node:/clotho-relative/permitted-merkle-dag only; spine read-only; orchestrator/4b/D34 deferred. Deterministic gate finalStatus=meets. No reinterpretation or scope expansion. Stakeable as-is.
